episodes.title: EXCLUSIVE: Jeffrey Epstein’s Brother Says 'People Wanted Him Dead' | GNT
episodes.description:
On Global News Today on Al Arabiya English, Tom Burges Watson speaks exclusively to Mark Epstein, brother of Jeffrey Epstein, about his ongoing claim that evidence exists proving his brother was murdered. 


Jeffrey Epstein’s death in a New York jail cell in 2019 was officially ruled a suicide, but controversy and public scrutiny have never faded. In this exclusive interview, Mark Epstein outlines why he disputes the official findings, what evidence he believes supports his position, and why he continues to push for further investigation. 


This in-depth conversation explores: 
• The unanswered questions surrounding Epstein’s death 
• Claims challenging the official ruling 
• Legal and forensic controversies 
• Why the case continues to fuel global debate


Watch the full exclusive interview for detailed insight into one of the most widely discussed and controversial cases in recent US history.


#JeffreyEpstein #MarkEpstein #GlobalNewsToday #GNT #AlArabiyaEnglish #BreakingNews #USNews #EpsteinCase #TrueCrime #LegalControversy #NewYork #JusticeSystem #ExclusiveInterview #WorldNews

episodes.title: Jeffrey Epstein Murder Claims: Brother Says New Autopsy Will ‘Prove It’
episodes.description:
Jeffrey Epstein’s death has always raised questions and now his brother Mark is making waves again, claiming new autopsy details coming in February will prove Epstein was murdered, not a suicide. We review the claims in this edition of Pixel.


#JeffreyEpstein #EpsteinCase #MarkEpstein #BreakingNews #USNews #TrueCrime #EpsteinFiles #AutopsyReport #JusticeDepartment #ConspiracyClaims #Investigations #GlobalNews #CourtNews #PrisonDeath #NewsUpdate #AlArabiyaNews #Pixel

episodes.title: 'He’s Been Regarded As A COMPLETE IDIOT & BUFFOON' Former Royal Protection Chief On Andrew Arrest
episodes.description:
In this segment of GNT on Al Arabiya English, host Tom Burges Watson covers breaking developments after Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, brother of King Charles III, was arrested on suspicion of misconduct in public office.


The arrest reportedly took place at the Sandringham Estate in Norfolk, prompting a statement from King Charles III, who said he learned of the arrest “with the deepest concern” and that “the law must take its course.” It is understood that Prince William and Catherine, Princess of Wales, support the King’s position.


Police are searching multiple addresses in Berkshire and Norfolk, including the Royal Lodge in Windsor, where Andrew lived until recently.


To analyze the legal, security, and constitutional implications, we speak to:


Guest: Dai Davies
Title: Former Head of UK Royal Protection


#PrinceAndrew #AndrewMountbattenWindsor #KingCharles #RoyalFamily #UKNews #BreakingNews #GNT #AlArabiyaEnglish #EpsteinFiles #Sandringham #Windsor #RoyalLodge #BritishMonarchy #WorldNews #GlobalPolitics

episodes.title: Who Is Karyna Shuliak, Epstein’s Last Girlfriend? | Pixel
episodes.description:
Before his death, Jeffrey Epstein’s partner was not Ghislaine Maxwell but Karyna Shuliak. Set to inherit $100 million, diamonds, and multiple properties, she also managed Epstein’s inner circle, earning the nickname “The Inspector.”


In this edition of Pixel, we take a closer look at Shuliak, who continues to stay under the radar.


#JeffreyEpstein #KarynaShuliak #GhislaineMaxwell #TrueCrime #Pixel #AlArabiyaNews #Investigative #CrimeStory #USNews #EpsteinCase #BreakingNews
